message:
🌱 Add opencost: No request or usage data found during CPU allocation mission (#1340)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opencost-2281-no-request-or-usage-data-found-during-cpu-allocation-calculation",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opencost: No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation",
+    "description": "No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "analyze",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify opencost analyze symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your opencost deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost -n opencost --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opencost configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opencost configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost\nkubectl get configmap -n opencost -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opencost\n```\nWarning in opencost container logs, warning are repeated every couple of minutes:\n\n```\nkubectl get pods -n opencost\nopencost-844c646598-8c6d7   2/2     Running   0          80m\n\nkubectl logs opencost-844c646598-8c6d7 opencost -n"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for No request or usage data found during CPU allocation…",
+        "description": "Hey ! Thanks for the details provided here. Those logs can be safely ignored at this time! You can reduce the log level by setting the `LOG_LEVEL=warn` environment variable. If you installed via helm, there are some details here:\n```yaml\nkubectl get pods -n opencost\nopencost-844c646598-8c6d7   2/2     Running   0          80m\n\nkubectl logs opencost-844c646598-8c6d7 opencost -n opencost\n2023-11-02T10:32:36.413083616Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0.\n2023-11-02T10:32:36.413303319Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0.\n2023-11-02T10:32:36.41340512Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0.\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm No request or usage data found during CPU… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opencost -n opencost --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n opencost --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hey ! Thanks for the details provided here. Those logs can be safely ignored at this time! You can reduce the log level by setting the `LOG_LEVEL=warn` environment variable.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kubectl get pods -n opencost\nopencost-844c646598-8c6d7   2/2     Running   0          80m\n\nkubectl logs opencost-844c646598-8c6d7 opencost -n opencost\n2023-11-02T10:32:36.413083616Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0.\n2023-11-02T10:32:36.413303319Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0.\n2023-11-02T10:32:36.41340512Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0.",
+        "USER-SUPPLIED VALUES:\nextraVolumes:\n- configMap:\n    name: opencost-aws\n  name: custom-configs\nnameOverride: opencost\nopencost:\n  customPricing:\n    configPath: /tmp/custom-config\n    configmapName: custom-pricing-model\n    createConfigmap: true\n    enabled: false\n  exporter:\n    defaultClusterId: iob-eks-1\n    extraEnv:\n      AWS_PRICING_URL: https://pricing.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/offers/v1.0/aws/AmazonEC2/current/eu-west-1/index.json\n      CONFIG_PATH: /tmp/custom-config\n    extraVolumeMounts:\n    - mountPath: /tmp/custom-config\n      name: custom-configs\n    replicas: 2\n    resources:\n      limits:\n        cpu: 1000m\n        memory: 1Gi\n      requests:\n        cpu: 10m\n        memory: 55Mi\n  metrics:\n    serviceMonitor:\n      additionalLabels:\n        lnrs.io/monitoring-platform: \"true",
+        "2023-11-21T08:19:01.40243535Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0.\n2023-11-21T08:19:01.402917562Z WRN No request or usage data found during CPU allocation calculation. Setting allocation to 0."
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opencost",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "analyze"
+    ],

+      "opencost"
+    ],

+      "Pod",

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/opencost/opencost/issues/2281",

+    },

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"

+  },
